# americancloud_vpc_network (Resource)

A Virtual Private Cloud network. `name` and `description` are updatable in place. Tier subnets are managed outside this resource for now (see provider docs).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "americancloud_vpc_network" "example" {
  name   = "prod-vpc"
  region = "us-west-0"
  cidr   = "10.0.0.0/16"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr` (String) VPC CIDR block, e.g. `10.0.0.0/16`. Changing this forces a new VPC.
- `name` (String) VPC name.
- `region` (String) Region label, e.g. `us-west-0`. Changing this forces a new VPC.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation time (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) VPC identifier (UUID).
- `status` (String) VPC status.
